ab: awni i papsibaq la.
en: The teacher is here.

ab: laxi ku maganawu’ la, nabuwibuwi i matahunak i tatahunakan.
ch: B:不要再玩了，快坐在座位上。
en: Stop playing and quickly sit in your seat.

ab: apaw wala! hanuan kiy! sumiyahoq kuwing la!
en: Sorry, I’m late!

ab: nabuwibuwi i patagi papatiqan.
en: Come in quickly.

ab: papatuwawan tagi piya’ i sawni’?
en: What day is it today?

ab: papatuwawan tagi imagal sawni’, pauhngeq i casan, magalgay ta’ i musa’ maganawu’ ga!
ch: B:今天星期五，明天放假，一起出去玩吧!
en: It’s Friday today, we have a day off tomorrow. Let’s go out and play together!

ab: uwal! halay ta’ i siyag na luliyung.
en: Great! Let’s go to the riverside.

ab: papatuwawan tagi piya’ i casan?
en: What day will it be tomorrow?

ab: papatuwawan tagi tugal i casan, mausa’ ta’ i maganawu’ cu mari’ i kuminuriax casan ga!
ch: B:明天星期三，我們明天下午去玩球吧!
en: Tomorrow will be Wednesday. Let’s go play ball tomorrow afternoon!

ab: nanuwan ku waw su’ i kasasanan casan?
en: What will you be doing tomorrow morning?

ab: a’hahangiqan i casan, mausa’ kuwing ki yaya’ i kiyukay.
ch: B:明天是星期日，我要和媽媽去教會。
en: Tomorrow will be Sunday, I will be going to church with my mom.

ab: humicuwa’ su’ la?
en: What’s wrong?

ab: mikimutaq kuwing, mausa’ kuwing i papasqutian.
en: I feel like vomiting. I need to go to the restroom.

ab: matukayran a tunux mu.
en: I feel dizzy.

ab: pataqawmug i mungeq isu’.
en: Lie down and rest.

ab: papsibaq, muxaal a nabuwas mu, mausa’ kuwing i papasqutian.
ch: A:老師，我肚子痛，要去廁所。
en: Teacher, I have a stomachache. I need to go to the restroom.

ab: uwal, nabuwibuwi tikay i musa’.
en: Okay, go quickly.

ab: pakabalayq kuwing i musa’ i mayma’ cu qaba’ qu?
en: May I go wash my hands?

ab: sawbeh pauhngeq i mateq la, usa’ i kisa’.
en: It’s almost time for class to end. Wait a little longer.

ab: papsibaq, muxaal a tunux mu, pauhngeq kuwing i kuminuriax.
ch: A:老師，我頭好痛，下午要請假。
en: It’s almost time for class to end. Wait a little longer.

ab: uwal, panabaq i musa’ imuwag.
en: Okay, take care and go home.

ab: papsibaq, pauhngeq kuwing i babaw na a’hahangiqan i paptuwawan tagi qutux, mausa’ kuwing i pakitaal cu kuwisang.
ch: A:老師我下禮拜一要請假，我要去看醫生。
en: Teacher, I need to take a sick leave next Monday. I have to see a doctor.

ab: uwal, nabalayq i malahang ku hihihi’.
en: Alright, take care of yourself.

ab: kiya inu’ i Bagan?
en: Where is Bagan?

ab: muxaal a nabuwas niya’, kiya i papasqutian.
en: She has a stomachache. She’s in the restroom.

ab: kiya inu’ i Atung?
en: Where is Atung?

ab: papsibaq, muxaal a waqcug ni Atung muhngeq sawni’.
ch: B:老師，Atung 喉嚨痛，今天請假。
en: Teacher, Atung has a sore throat. She took a sick leave today.

ab: micuwa’ ka ini’ uwah i Haking?
en: Why didn’t Haking come?

ab: makilux i hiya’ la.
en: She has a fever.
